response.overview: In this playful animated adventure, the mischievous brothers Castrom and Sujus come up with a scheme to get rich: sell the castle and keep the profits for themselves. To scare everyone away, they disguise themselves as ghosts and begin haunting the castle, hoping the residents will flee. But with a group made up of inventive children, a quirky inventor, and a powerful witch, their plan quickly spirals into chaos. Filled with comedy, imagination, and family-friendly fun, Fantasmas is a charming episode from the Castelpadels universe.
response.title: Fantasmas (Castelpadel)
